basic_details.job_title: CSIR NEERI Project Associate II Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: CSIR National Enviromental Engineering Research Institute
basic_details.short_information: CSIR National Environmental Engineering Research Institute (CSIR-NEERI) has published the Project Associate II Notification 2026 on the official website, neeri.res.in. The recruitment drive aims to fill 3 Project Associate II positions. Candidates up to 35 years of age with an M.Sc. in Chemistry, Agricultural Chemistry & Soil Science, Microbiology, Environmental Science, or Environmental Management along with 2 years of relevant experience are eligible to attend the walk-in interview on 30 July 2026. Candidates can easily access the official notification PDF and walk-in interview details below

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc in Chemistry/ Agricultural Chemistry & Soil Science/ Microbiology/ Environmental Science/ Environmental Management with 2 years experience
qualification.details: M. Sc in Chemistry/ Agricultural Chemistry & Soil Science/ Microbiology/ Environmental Science /Environmental Management AND 2 years experience in Research and Development in Industrial and Academic Institutions or Science & Technology Organizations and Scientific Activities and Services.

salary_details.details: Rs. 35,000/- + HRA (NET/GATE qualified) or Rs. 28,000/- + HRA (others) Per Month

_labels.notification_pdf: Download CSIR NEERI Project Associate-II Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download CSIR NEERI Project Associate-II Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.csir_national_enviromental_engineering_r: M.Sc in Chemistry/ Agricultural Chemistry & Soil Science/ Microbiology/ Environmental Science/ Environmental Management with 2 years experience

content_sections.heading: CSIR NEERI Project Associate II Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the CSIR NEERI Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download CSIR NEERI Project Associate-II Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: CSIR NEERI Project Associate II Vacancy Details 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: M. Sc in Chemistry/ Agricultural Chemistry & Soil Science/ Microbiology/ Environmental Science /Environmental Management AND 2 years experience in Research and Development in Industrial and Academic Institutions or Science & Technology Organizations and Scientific Activities and Services.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Rs. 35,000/- + HRA (NET/GATE qualified) or Rs. 28,000/- + HRA (others) Per Month

content_sections.heading: CSIR NEERI Project Associate II Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for CSIR NEERI Project Associate-II Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: CSIR NEERI Project Associate II Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for CSIR NEERI Project Associate-II posts?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Project Associate-II posts at CSIR NEERI is scheduled for 30 July 2026. Candidates should ensure they attend on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Associate-II position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc degree in Chemistry, Agricultural Chemistry & Soil Science, Microbiology, Environmental Science, or Environmental Management, along with at least 2 years of relevant research experience.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Associate-II recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Project Associate-II position is 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate-II role?
faq.answer: The salary for the Project Associate-II position ranges from Rs. 28,000 to Rs. 35,000 per month, plus House Rent Allowance (HRA), depending on whether the candidate has qualified NET/GATE.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Project Associate-II post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies for the Project Associate-II position announced by CSIR NEERI.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Associate-II posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for these positions will be based on a Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates (if applicable), along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q9. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at the CSIR NEERI office in New Delhi. The exact address and timing will be available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent job?
faq.answer: No, the Project Associate-II positions are contractual in nature, as indicated in the job details.
